query:
INSERT IGNORE INTO kc_library (kc_id, name, domain, jurisdiction, category, authority_type, authority_cite, authority_notes, tags) VALUES
('CIV_FED_1983', 'Civil Rights — 42 U.S.C. § 1983', 'civil', 'FED', 'Civil Rights', 'statute', '42 U.S.C. § 1983', 'State/local actors; constitutional deprivation under color of law.', 'civil-rights,constitutional'),
('CIV_FED_TITLE_VII', 'Employment Discrimination — Title VII', 'civil', 'FED', 'Employment', 'statute', '42 U.S.C. § 2000e-2', 'Protected class discrimination; EEOC prerequisites.', 'employment,discrimination'),
('CIV_FED_ADA_I', 'Employment Disability Discrimination — ADA Title I', 'civil', 'FED', 'Employment', 'statute', '42 U.S.C. § 12112', 'Disability + qualified individual + accommodation/interactive process.', 'employment,disability'),
('CIV_FED_FLSA_MIN_WAGE', 'Wage & Hour — FLSA Minimum Wage', 'civil', 'FED', 'Employment / Wage & Hour', 'statute', '29 U.S.C. § 206', 'Minimum wage.', 'wage-hour,flsa'),
('CIV_FED_FLSA_OVERTIME', 'Wage & Hour — FLSA Overtime', 'civil', 'FED', 'Employment / Wage & Hour', 'statute', '29 U.S.C. § 207', 'Overtime.', 'wage-hour,flsa'),
('CIV_FED_CIVIL_RICO_1964C', 'Civil RICO (Private Action)', 'civil', 'FED', 'RICO / Fraud', 'statute', '18 U.S.C. § 1964(c)', 'Requires underlying § 1962 violation + injury + causation.', 'rico,fraud,treble-damages');
